reviews.comment:

Excellent service on the beach!
At the Full, a man bought a coffee which he dropped before reaching the table, and no one from the establishment was able to help him or give him another one.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Carlos!!! Gracias por tu comentario. De todas maneras gracias por comentar. Te esperamos pronto. Saludos

reviews.comment:
En Boxes ya es la segunda , y no habrá una tercera , que no tienen filtro de aire para hacer el Service . Por suerte , (y porque la vez pasada no solo , no me avisaron que no tenían , sino xque me avivé a los dos meses yo , revisando el filtro de aire  y noté que era el viejo ) esta vez lo consulté antes de ingresar el auto , ya habiendo perdido tiempo en la espera y aún habiendo agendado el turno con 15 días de anticipación por la app, y tampoco tenían filtro de aire . Con lo que me fui . Ahora , la pregunta es : si le hacen agendar el turno al cliente , le pidan que describa el auto modelo año y demás información , que pareciera innecesaria, por qué  no se molestan en a) CONSEGUIR EL FILTRO, b) AVISARLE AL CLIENTE QUE NO LO CONSIGUEN ANTES ASÍ NO PIERDE TIEMPO Y DINERO YENDO HASTA ALLÍ c) NO LES IMPORTA QUEDAR COMO IMPROVISADOS . Me intriga saber como grandes empresas se comportan peor que un kioskito de barrio

(Translated by Google)
This is the second time, and there won't be a third, that they haven't had an air filter for servicing. Luckily (and because last time they not only didn't tell me they didn't have one, but I only realized it two months later when I checked the air filter and noticed it was the old one), this time I checked before bringing the car in, having already wasted time waiting and even though I had scheduled the appointment 15 days in advance through the app, and they still didn't have an air filter. So I left. Now, the question is: if they make the customer schedule an appointment, ask them to describe the car's make, model, year, and other seemingly unnecessary information, why don't they bother to a) GET THE FILTER, b) INFORM THE CUSTOMER THAT THEY CAN'T GET IT BEFOREHAND SO THEY DON'T WASTE TIME AND MONEY GOING THERE, c) why don't they care about looking like they're just winging it? I'm intrigued to know how large companies can behave worse than a neighborhood kiosk.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Julián!!!! Gracias por tu cometario y lamentamos tu mala  experiencia. Luego de analizar lo ocurrido nos pondremos en contacto a la brevedad. Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyeGZPckR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Fui am ACA a sacar el carnet internacional. Te atienden muy bien pero me parece ridículo que en 2024 te pidan fotocopias de tus documentos y foto carnet. Ya es hora que se digitalicen o al menos saquen las fotos y fotocopias ustedes. Una falta a la experiencia del cliente total.

(Translated by Google)
I went to ACA to get my international driving permit. The service was very good, but I find it ridiculous that in 2024 they still require photocopies of your documents and a passport photo. It's about time they digitized everything or at least took the photos and made the copies themselves. It's a complete failure of the customer experience.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes Ailin. Agradecemos tu comentario y lo compartimos con los sectores involucrados. Esperamos mejorar para tu próxima visita. Saludos
